sections.lead: Claude Code sessions use `claude.md` files for persistent memory, storing coding preferences and project structure.

bullets.label: Persistent Memory
bullets.text: Claude Code sessions begin without project context, but `claude.md` files provide persistent memory.

bullets.label: Project Root
bullets.text: This markdown file, placed in your project root, stores coding preferences and project structure.

bullets.label: Consistent Behavior
bullets.text: It acts as a memory that Claude Code reads at the start of every session, ensuring consistent behavior like 'always write unit tests'.

bullets.label: Easy Creation
bullets.text: You can easily create a `claude.md` file using the `/init` command.

sections.lead: Claude Code's Permissions and Plan Mode enhance safety and structure for powerful coding agent operations.

bullets.label: Custom Permissions
bullets.text: Claude Code's Permissions feature allows customizing approval behavior, enabling pre-approval for safe actions like running tests.

bullets.label: Manage Safety
bullets.text: Accessed via `/permissions`, this interactive menu helps balance speed and safety by blocking dangerous actions such as deleting files.

bullets.label: Plan Mode
bullets.text: For complex tasks, Plan Mode, activated with Shift+Tab, separates planning from execution in a read-only state.

bullets.label: Review Plans
bullets.text: In Plan Mode, Claude Code proposes a step-by-step plan for your review and approval before actual execution.

bullets.label: Prevent Errors
bullets.text: This prevents wasted tokens and incorrect edits by allowing you to approve the plan prior to any changes.

sections.lead: Skills and Hooks in Claude Code automate repetitive tasks and ensure deterministic actions within development workflows.

bullets.label: Define Skills
bullets.text: Skills are `skill.md` files containing a name, description, and instructions that Claude Code can load on demand.

bullets.label: Auto-Invoke
bullets.text: By providing a list of available skills at session start, Claude Code can auto-invoke the appropriate skill when needed.

bullets.label: Share Automation
bullets.text: Skills turn repetitive tasks into shareable automation for your team.

bullets.label: Automate Hooks
bullets.text: Hooks are scripts that run automatically at specific points in Claude Code's workflow loop, such as before or after a tool run.

bullets.label: Deterministic Actions
bullets.text: Hooks are ideal for deterministic actions that must always occur, like code formatting, security checks, or logging.

sections.lead: MCP and Plugins extend Claude Code capabilities, integrating external tools and sharing configurations across teams.

bullets.label: External Tools
bullets.text: The MCP (Agent Communication Protocol) is an open protocol allowing developers to build and expose external tools, integrating services like Figma or Slack.

bullets.label: Tool Access
bullets.text: By adding an MCP server, Claude Code gains access to thousands of publicly available tools.

bullets.label: Bundle Plugins
bullets.text: Plugins bundle complex setups, including custom skills, hooks, and MCP servers, into a single installable unit.

bullets.label: Publish & Install
bullets.text: You can create a plugin, publish it to a marketplace or Git repository, and teammates can install it with a single command.

bullets.label: Consistent Environments
bullets.text: Plugins ensure consistent environments across a team by streamlining the sharing of these configurations.

sections.lead: Claude Code efficiently manages session context and tasks via compaction, Slash Commands, and Sub-agents.

bullets.label: Context Window
bullets.text: Claude Code operates within a fixed context window of around 200,000 tokens, which can fill as conversations grow.

bullets.label: Compaction
bullets.text: Claude Code can compact the conversation, preserving key decisions while freeing up space in the context window.

bullets.label: Manage Context
bullets.text: You can check context consumption with `/context` and manually trigger compaction with `/compact` before it happens automatically.

bullets.label: Slash Commands
bullets.text: Slash Commands act as keyboard shortcuts, triggering common workflows like checking costs or clearing sessions (e.g., `/init`, `/rewind`, `/context`).

bullets.label: Delegate Tasks
bullets.text: For complex tasks, Sub-agents allow Claude Code to delegate specific jobs to separate sessions.

bullets.label: Clean Conversation
bullets.text: Sub-agents work independently and return a concise summary, keeping the main conversation clean and the context window lean.

sections.lead: Claude Code's features enhance developer productivity, safety, and collaboration with coding agents.

bullets.label: Comprehensive Suite
bullets.text: Claude Code offers a comprehensive suite of features designed to enhance developer productivity, safety, and collaboration.

bullets.label: Key Features
bullets.text: These features include personalized memory, robust permission controls, advanced automation, and extensibility.

bullets.label: Efficient Management
bullets.text: Efficient session management is also a core part of Claude Code's offerings.

bullets.label: Transform Software
bullets.text: These tools fundamentally change how software is built when working with coding agents.

bullets.label: Explore Potential
bullets.text: Exploring these features by actively using Claude Code is encouraged to fully grasp their potential.
